title: SAMMY'S PLACE - 211info
text: OREGON COAAST NETWORK SAMMY'S PLACE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information and referral about support networks, programs, and community agencies relating to the topic of intellectual and/or developmental disabilities. Website Nehalem, OR 97131 Eligibility: Individuals with intellectual or developmental disabilities and their friends and family members Hours: Not applicable Email Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clatsop, Lincoln, and Tillamook Counties Services: Specialized Information and Referral * Disabilities Issues If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON COAAST NETWORK
